pages.title: Say It With Your Eyes
pages.tagline: Sultry Southern R&B whispers in D# major.

pages.body: Step into this slow-burning sanctuary of sound, where every note hums a quiet request to be seen. The track unfolds like a hushed conversation in a dimly lit room, dominated by heavy sub-bass and atmospheric synths that wrap around you. Breathless vocals drift over chopped and screwed rhythms, creating an intimate space for unspoken glances and visual obsession. Here, desire speaks without words; the music captures that singular moment when one person stays frozen across the distance while another moves with knowing grace. Let the dusty textures wash away the noise until only your gaze remains.
pages.styleSentence: A slow-burning D# major track at 123 BPM featuring chopped and screwed vocals over a dusty Southern R&B beat with heavy sub-bass, atmospheric synths, and distant guitar textures that create an underground club vibe.

members.name: BACKING VOX
members.bio: Weaves shadows around the lead melody.

members.name: DRUMS
members.bio: Keeps time with dusty Southern precision.

members.name: PERCUSSION
members.bio: Adds subtle, rhythmic cracks to the beat.

members.name: BASS
members.bio: Anchors the floor with heavy sub frequencies.

members.name: SYNTH
members.bio: Paints atmospheric clouds in low tones.

members.name: TEXTURES
members.bio: Dusts the air with distant guitar haze.

levels.name: QUANTUM ANTICIPATION
levels.emotion: Anticipation and quiet tension setting the stage for a visual encounter.

levels.name: DISTRACTION GAUNTLET
levels.emotion: A focused request to capture a fleeting moment of connection amidst distraction.

levels.name: HYPOPTIC ROOM LOOP
levels.emotion: Hypnotic longing and the surreal sensation of moving through a dark room solely for visual contact.

levels.name: COLD ELEGANCE ZONE
levels.emotion: Reinforced obsession with the subject's cold elegance and knowing distance.

levels.name: STILLNESS FREEZE FRAME
levels.emotion: Sudden stillness that freezes the scene on a single striking detail.

levels.name: FINALITY GRAVITY WELL
levels.emotion: Gratitude mixed with finality after an intense emotional exchange.

levels.name: AFTERGLOW ECHO CHAMBER
levels.emotion: Lingering echo of the visual connection fading into a quiet afterglow.
